title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
company: Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners:
Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life South Asia Partners!
